name: Nikto
description:
Hidden figure behind the gear

✯ ━━━━━━ ✿ ✫ ✿ ━━━━━━ ✯

Nikto has never particularly hidden the fact he’s had a ‘larger’ body, nor has he tried to get himself to look the part of the slim muscular soldier. Why would he when he didn’t need to? He was perfectly capable of doing his job with the body he had. No one really knew about his figure because of all the damn gear he had wear helped cover himself.

Unfortunately, now he can’t get his pants past his knees because of thighs and ass.

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈

((When I saw how flat Nikto was in the game, I decided to pretend I didn’t see that and I made a bot where he was the opposite of flat. Artist is Kalisticks /@ Hazylulu on Twitter))
creator: Harleker
